Since 2005, we started computer science and engineering courses are caring for the health of you and your family. We depend on your kind support to provide our care services.

About Dr.M.G.R.

Infrastructure

Learning Ambience at Dr. M.G.R. University is Noteworthy.
Laboratories
Library
Computing Facilities

Next-Gen Infrastructure: Built for Brilliance

  • Extensive academic & research resources
  • Innovative student & faculty support
  • 230-seat reading hall
  • Periodicals & digital access
  • Open 12 hours daily
  • 24/7 e-resources access

We offers a robust infrastructure, comprehensive library services, and advanced computing facilities to support academic excellence

Knowledge Powerhouse: Libraries That Inspire Learning

  • Central Library is in the VOC Block, Maduravoyal Campus.
  • Offers rich resources and student-faculty support.
  • Law Library seats 230 readers.
  • Includes periodicals and digital access.
  • Open 12 hours daily.
  • E-resources available on/off-campus via login.
  • Access to subscribed journals and databases.
  • Supports research and independent study.

Smart Tech Ecosystem: Computing for the Future

  • Departments have well-furnished laboratories.
  • Each department includes a dedicated library.
  • R&D facilities support academic and research work.
  • Campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled.
  • Seamless internet access for students and faculty.
  • Computer labs feature latest hardware and licensed software.
  • Labs promote hands-on learning and innovation.
